title: Auto-Release Queue Item
description: A single purely-additive change consumed by one auto-release cascade tick.

id.description: Unique slug. Must not collide with any prior 'applied' entry.

label.description: Human-readable description shown in the auto-release commit body.

type.description: Only 'new_file' supported at v1. Workflow refuses to overwrite an existing file at 'target'.

target.description: Relative path inside the repo. Must be under the mod's data dir and end with .json.

content.description: The complete file contents to write at 'target'. JSON object or array.

commit_message.description: Conventional-commits style. The auto-release wrapper appends ' [skip ci]'.
